task.title: Create Next.js web console project
task.description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with App Router, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, and Effect setup

implementation.details: Setup Next.js with App Router, install shadcn/ui components, configure TailwindCSS 4, setup Effect 3.x with TypeScript, create basic project structure.

decision.description: State management strategy for UI state

task.acceptance_criteria: Next.js app builds and runs, shadcn/ui components work, TailwindCSS styles apply, Effect imports function correctly
